name: FailedDownloadClassifier
author: evenwebb
about: Classify failed downloads (DMCA vs missing articles vs password, etc.).
requirements: This script requires Python 3.8 and above to be installed on your system.
description: Classifies common failure patterns using NZBGet status variables and (optionally) log text found in the download folder.
Separates DMCA/takedown vs missing-articles when hints are present.
Writes artifacts into the download folder: .nzbget_failure_classification.json/.txt (and optional marker file).

options.name: ArtifactDir
description: Where to store artifacts: download, final, or both.

options.name: MaxBytesPerFile
description: Max bytes to read per candidate file.

options.name: MaxFiles
description: Max number of files to scan for evidence.
